subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1915-06-23
subcodes.first_line: I have repeated on various occasions that the foundation of the progress of the Bahá'í Cause consists in the spread of the message... This is the time for laying the foundation and raising the walls. This is not the time to think of the interior decoration and furniture.
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
